title: The Pioneering Discovery by James Webb

scenes.text: James Webb may have found a never-before-seen molecule on Titan!
This discovery could revolutionize our understanding of Titan's atmosphere.
Titan is the only moon with a dense atmosphere, similar to early Earth.
This could unlock secrets about life's origins!
scenes.label: SECRETS OF LIFE

scenes.text: Follow for daily science that blows your mind.

description: James Webb may have identified a new molecule on Titan, changing our view of its atmosphere. Follow for daily science!
